# add-on appended after compliance_assess prompt body (do not edit compliance_assess.txt)

For EVERY finding, add optional fields:
- "confidence_level": "high" | "medium" | "low" | "uncertain"
- "source_articles": list of citations matching chunk evidence
- "confidence_notes": brief rationale

Add top-level:
- "analysis_confidence": {{
    "overall_score": 0.0-1.0,
    "high_confidence_claims": 0,
    "medium_confidence_claims": 0,
    "low_confidence_claims": 0,
    "uncertain_claims": 0,
    "disclaimer": "string when any finding is uncertain"
  }}
